name: Talmar Romeo Juliet
overview: A budding romance stirs up an all-out war between two rival families in the little hamlet of Talma, where a shocking twist flips everything upside down. Will love conquer all, or will history repeat its tragic end in this quirky twist on William Shakespeare's classic?
